---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for ATHENA
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the requested feature.

Example:

> Add Relative Strength Ranking to Market Intelligence.

---

# Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

Describe:

- Current limitation
- Pain point
- Business impact

---

# Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution.

Include:

- User workflow
- Expected behavior
- Business rules
- UI changes
- API changes (if applicable)

---

# Business Value

Select one.

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

Explain why this feature is valuable.

---

# Affected Module

- [ ] Platform
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Market Intelligence
- [ ] Scanner Intelligence
- [ ] Setup Intelligence
- [ ] Probability Engine
- [ ] Decision Engine
- [ ] Validation Engine
- [ ] Risk Engine
- [ ] Portfolio
- [ ] Knowledge
- [ ] Learning
- [ ] Reporting
- [ ] AI
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

---

# User Story

As a

> ___________

I want

> ___________

So that

> ___________

---

# Acceptance Criteria

Example:

- [ ] Market ranking displayed
- [ ] API available
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated

---

# UI / UX

Does this require UI changes?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, describe the expected interface.

---

# API Impact

Does this require API changes?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, describe:

- New endpoints
- Modified endpoints
- Request/Response changes

---

# Database Impact

Does this require database changes?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, describe:

- New tables
- Modified schema
- New indexes
- Migrations required

---

# Security Impact

Does this feature require changes to:

- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Authorization
- [ ] Permissions
- [ ] None

---

# Performance Considerations

Will this feature:

- [ ] Increase database load
- [ ] Increase API latency
- [ ] Require caching
- [ ] Require background jobs
- [ ] No significant impact

Explain if necessary.

---

# Dependencies

Does this depend on another milestone or feature?

Examples:

- Market Intelligence
- Scanner Engine
- Portfolio Module

---

# Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions.

---

# Additional Context

Include screenshots, sketches, references, or notes.

---

# Priority (Maintainers)

- [ ] P0
- [ ] P1
- [ ] P2
- [ ] P3

---

# Estimated Sprint

- [ ] Sprint 1
- [ ] Sprint 2
- [ ] Sprint 3
- [ ] Future Backlog

---

# Definition of Ready

Before implementation:

- [ ] Business problem defined
- [ ] Acceptance criteria complete
- [ ] Dependencies identified
- [ ] Architecture reviewed
- [ ] Product Owner approved

---

Thank you for helping improve ATHENA.
